case_title: FENDER HOUSE VS EASTMONT AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $275.00 FILED BY FENDER HOUSE AS TO DEFENDANT EASTMONT AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EASTMONT AUTO SERVICE
CHANGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FENDER HOUSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASTMONT AUTO SERVICE $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $303.00, DEFT'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EASTMONT AUTO SERVICE
